text.content:
Salubri

The Cyclops

In-Clan Disciplines: Auspex, Dominate, Fortitude

Clan Bane

Third Eye. The Salubri possess a mystical third eye in the center of their forehead. The eye opens involuntarily whenever the Salubri uses a Discipline, making them obviously supernatural. The eye weeps blood when they are hungry (Hunger 4+), staining their face. The third eye cannot be surgically removed — it regenerates each night. Covering it with a bandana or hat is common but the eye sometimes opens on its own during stress.

Compulsion

Affective Empathy. The vampire becomes overwhelmed by the suffering of others nearby. They must attempt to alleviate the pain, grief, or distress of the most afflicted person in the scene — through comfort, healing, or removing the source of suffering. They cannot inflict harm or ignore suffering while in this state. Until they have meaningfully eased someone's pain, they suffer a 2-dice penalty to all rolls.
